subtask: Summarize 10 Tableau dashboards into 6 stakeholder-ready insights for a Monthly Business Review using GPT

items.title: awesome-chatgpt-prompts
items.snippet: A Python repository: This repo includes ChatGPT prompt curation to use ChatGPT and other LLM tools better.
items.reflection: - adjacent: while the content is related to using gpt models and could potentially provide some insights into prompt engineering, it doesn't directly address the task of summarizing tableau dashboards or creating ai-powered reporting workflows.
items.description: A Python repository: This repo includes ChatGPT prompt curation to use ChatGPT and other LLM tools better.
items.why: "By exploring the 'awesome-chatgpt-prompts' Python repository, you'll gain insights into prompt engineering, a key aspect of AI and machine learning. This repository includes curated prompts for ChatGPT and other language model tools, which will help you understand how to effectively generate AI responses. This is particularly relevant for your use case, as you can learn to engineer prompts for AI to generate insight-ready slides for your Monthly Business Review in healthcare claims.
